title: Flipkart Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Flipkart Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group has an exciting opening for a E-commerce Executive at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!
